case_title: ZOE PHELAN KRIZNER VS. CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRIZNER, ZOE PHELAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC) $1,865.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,930.00, CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARE NOT COVERED UNDER THE VEHICLE WARRANTY NOR IS THE LOSS OF USE OF THE VEHICLE. ALSO THE 561 RECALL NOTICE DID NOT INCLUDE A STOP DURING INSTRUCTION. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT AGREED TO COMPENSATE PLAINTIFF FOR CAR RENTALS BEGINNING MAY 4, 2017. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KRIZNER, ZOE PHELAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KRIZNER, ZOE PHELAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-08-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ZOE PHELAN KRIZNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRYSLER (FCA US LLC) IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BRIAN STOSKOFF, BAY AREA MANAGER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF NOV-01-2017
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
